content:
To my friends, I am already their go-to "CA Sahab." 

To the ICAI, I am a dedicated CA Finalist working hard to earn those initials officially.

This journey has been all about resilience, deep technical learning, and practical problem-solving. Currently navigating the final milestone of the Chartered Accountancy course, I am eager to connect with professionals in the finance, audit, and taxation space as I prepare to step into the corporate world as a qualified professional.



hashtag
#happycaday 
hashtag

comment: Final stretch helps technically, but corporate onboarding often tests ERP fluency and month-end close rhythms more than concepts—worth shadowing industry closes early.
